hero.label: Fan Engagement Platform
hero.subtitle: Your support has always been free. Your artist never knew your name. CelestiFan changes both — turning fan dedication into recognition and giving artists visibility into who's truly riding for them.
hero.socialProofLabel: artists & fans already on the waitlist

howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.subtitle: Three simple steps to revolutionize your music journey

trackFanPower.title: Track Fan Power
trackFanPower.description: Real-time insights on your most loyal listeners and supporters

climbLeaderboards.title: Climb Leaderboards
climbLeaderboards.description: Earn celeste for streams, shares, and engagement activities

unlockMoments.title: Unlock Epic Moments
unlockMoments.description: Access exclusive content and direct artist interactions

whyCelestifan.title: Why CelestiFan?
whyCelestifan.subtitle: CelestiFan is more than just a platform; it's a movement. We're dedicated to empowering artists and giving fans a voice. Here's how we're changing the game.

launchCampaigns.title: Launch Campaigns
launchCampaigns.description: As an artist, you're in control. Design and launch dynamic campaigns that mobilize your fanbase. Create exciting challenges, set streaming goals, and offer unique rewards to build unstoppable momentum for your new releases. Watch in real-time as your fans rally to support your music, driving streams and expanding your reach organically. It's your vision, your music, your movement.

proveFandom.title: Prove Your Fandom
proveFandom.description: Your support is more than just a number. With CelestiFan, you can prove your dedication by uploading screenshots of your streams, shares, and purchases. This tangible proof of your fandom earns you celeste, unlocks exclusive content, and gets you noticed by your favorite artists. It's a direct way to show your impact and be rewarded for your loyalty in a way that truly matters.

shineBright.title: Shine Bright
shineBright.description: Rise through the ranks and make your mark. Our dynamic leaderboards track real-time fan engagement, showcasing the most dedicated supporters for each artist. Compete with other fans, climb to the top, and gain recognition for your unwavering passion. This is your chance to shine bright, get noticed by artists, and become a legendary supporter in your favorite music community.

connectDirectly.title: Connect Directly
connectDirectly.description: Break down the barriers between artist and fan. CelestiFan offers exclusive chat rooms and communities where you can connect directly with the artists you admire. Get a behind-the-scenes look at their creative process, ask questions in intimate Q&A sessions, and join a community of like-minded fans. This is more than just a platform; it's a place to build genuine connections.

waitlist.descriptionGeneral: Music has always been built by two people — the artist who creates, and the fan who carries it into the world. CelestiFan is where both finally get what they deserve.
waitlist.descriptionArtist: Your fans are streaming at 2am, defending your catalog, building culture around your name — and you can't see any of them. CelestiFan changes that. Know who your real community is. Reward them. Build with them.
waitlist.descriptionFan: You've been carrying your artist further than any algorithm ever will — and getting nothing back for it. CelestiFan is where that finally changes. Your support earns, your dedication ranks, and the artist you ride for finally knows you're there.
waitlist.errorInvalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address
waitlist.errorGeneral: Something went wrong. Please try again.
waitlist.founderPerk: Early members get Founder status. That doesn't come back after launch.
waitlist.noSpam: No spam. No credit card. Just your seat at the table.

successModal.title: You're In.
successModal.description1: Your seat at the table is confirmed.
successModal.description2: The era where fans went unrecognised — and artists never knew who was really there — is over.
